summary: P0/P1 demo rails are built locally. H1 and E1 P2 safety gates are verified locally. Real voice plumbing is not built and flags remain off. Real-PHI pilot remains blocked by identity, async RLS, Part 2, SMS, and deployment-substrate controls.

workstreams.name: Retinopathy protocol state engine
workstreams.notes: Prototype-specific engine exists; production pack-parameterized rail is not built.

workstreams.name: Navigator queue
workstreams.notes: Demo queue exists; production single navigator_tasks table is not built.

workstreams.name: Source fact provenance shape
workstreams.notes: Seed provenance shape exists; FHIR-backed provenance is not built.

workstreams.name: Health alerts simulation
workstreams.notes: Static/pure simulation only; no real device or outreach scheduler.

workstreams.name: Kentucky SDOH resource finder
workstreams.notes: Prototype resource flow; production directory ownership and refresh cadence remain open.

workstreams.name: P2 deterministic safety gate
workstreams.notes: H1 and E1 are closed for the local P2 safety gate. Production alert transport still belongs to deployment substrate work before any real-PHI pilot.

workstreams.name: Real voice and tool gateway
workstreams.notes: Safety gate is verified. Realtime/WebRTC sessions, transcript storage, and live tool gateway are not built. Flags remain off.

workstreams.name: FHIR/claims/HIE ingestion
workstreams.notes: Requires FHIR store choice, identity corroboration, consent repository, RLS, and Part 2 controls.

workstreams.name: Deployment substrate
workstreams.notes: Status tracking exists. IaC, VPC, secrets, observability, and synthetic-PHI staging are not built.

blockers.title: Model-in-the-crisis-path
blockers.requiredControl: Versioned deterministic recall floor, maintained adversarial corpus, model-net-only hits hard-lock and create rule-gap tickets, and fail-safe alerting when the model net degrades.
blockers.residual: Closed for local P2 safety gate. Production alert transport remains deployment-substrate work before any real-PHI pilot.

blockers.title: Silent wrong-patient linkage
blockers.requiredControl: Strong-ID matches must corroborate DOB and/or name, downgrade mismatches to navigator review, and block autonomous outreach until patient confirmation.

blockers.title: Grounding verifier is a stub
blockers.requiredControl: Deterministic block layer using regex, lexicon, numeric normalization, and store-diff; model judge can only add blocks.

blockers.title: Async lane RLS bypass
blockers.requiredControl: Gateway-minted single-patient, pack-scoped, short-lived token for every async job; no standing broad async grant.

blockers.title: Part 2 leakage through facility identity
blockers.phaseGate: Before P3 HIE and P7 BH packs
blockers.requiredControl: Suppress sensitive facility identity before pack, insight, navigator, or outbound exposure; fail closed on unrecognized disposition.

blockers.title: Break-glass is not Part 2 consent
blockers.requiredControl: Define issuance, approval, TTL, mandatory review, audit event, and purpose-specific Part 2 consent.

blockers.title: SMS condition-name leakage
blockers.requiredControl: Approved template library, deterministic slotting, disclosure linting in every language, and category exclusion.

blockers.title: MPI ownership
blockers.requiredControl: Choose own MPI, KHIE MPI, or payer member-id approach; default is own MPI plus multi-field corroboration.

blockers.title: Adolescent confidential consent model
blockers.requiredControl: Pin Kentucky minor-consent ages and proxy disclosure rules before PHQ/GAD and SDOH packs.

blockers.title: Longitudinal instance granularity
blockers.requiredControl: Choose one long-lived instance per patient/pack or rolling intervals; default is long-lived instance plus high-frequency insight lane.

blockers.title: PDC window and drug-class grouping
blockers.requiredControl: Match the HEDIS/RHTP pdc_diabetes definition exactly.

blockers.title: CGM stream-vs-summary rule boundary
blockers.requiredControl: Choose which rules read raw Timescale streams versus FHIR summaries; default is raw per-night for nocturnal_hyperglycemia.

blockers.title: Native shell timing
blockers.requiredControl: Confirm Capacitor shell ships with the device rail, not earlier.

featureFlags.flipCondition: Real voice tool gateway, transcript storage, grounding verifier, and red-team gate pass.
Server flag is on and the browser bundle has been redeployed.
Claims/FHIR ingest, identity corroboration, consent, RLS, provenance, and Part 2 controls pass.
Template library, disclosure lint, opt-out, A2P path, and delivery telemetry pass.
Native shell, device consent, source labeling, and no-dosing guardrails pass.
A second pack ships as configuration and content with zero new rail code.
All real-PHI gates close, BAAs are recorded, and clinical safety sign-off is recorded.

nextActions: Run npm run ops:status before claiming current project state.
Run npm run safety:gate before claiming P2 safety-gate proof.
Build real voice Realtime/WebRTC session plumbing behind RHTP_REAL_VOICE and NEXT_PUBLIC_RHTP_REAL_VOICE.
Close E2 before any real-PHI pilot claim.
Assign owners for FHIR store, KHIE engagement, first Medicaid MCO, and model BAAs before P3 planning.
